summary: Replace the first M7 UX recovery validation writer after repeated waits and a status check produced no handoff and the shared worktree remained clean. Continue the same task with a replacement test_engineer.

tests_run.result: Shared worktree was clean before replacing stalled writer.
Initial writer remained running without final status after repeated waits and status check; close_agent previous_status was running.

decisions.decision: Close stalled writer 019f16bd-98b9-7c23-a2b6-91c336bfd61a and route same task to replacement test_engineer 019f16c8-c1dc-7dc0-9268-1763a59677be.
Replacement does not change task scope, acceptance criteria, content-lock status, or manual-node-battle decision.

risks.summary: The validation task may be slow due full build/storybook/e2e evidence requirements.
risks.mitigation: Replacement prompt asks for scoped evidence and explicit BLOCKED/PARTIAL handoff if validation cannot complete.

requested_action: Replacement test_engineer should continue M7-UX-RECOVERY-VALIDATION-001 and produce the writer REVIEW handoff.
